lesson.menu_desc: Present continuous for ongoing work at Sucafina -- 28 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 11 -- Talking About Ongoing Work: What Are You Doing Right Now?
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Carlos Eduardo | Aula 11 -- Present Continuous (Ongoing Work)

listenings.text: Let me tell you what I am doing this week. Right now, I am updating the Impact checklist for two coffee farms. At the moment, my team is organizing the farm documents for the next audit. I am also preparing a short report for the office in Geneva. This week is very busy. I am monitoring the sustainability data every day, and I am training a new colleague. She is learning the checklist with me. On Friday, we are planning the next field visit. So, right now, I am not visiting farms. I am working from the office in Varginha.

Hi Carlos, this is Emma from Geneva. I am calling about this week. I know you are very busy. Right now, the team here is reviewing your last report, and I am preparing the questions for the audit. Are you updating the checklist for the two farms? And is your colleague learning the process well? Please send me a short message today. Tell me what you are working on right now and what the team is doing this week. Thank you, Carlos. Talk soon.

extra_audio.text: Right now, Carlos is working from the office. At the moment, he is updating the Impact checklist. His team is organizing the farm documents. He is also training a new colleague this week. On Friday, they are planning the next field visit.
